Legal

Privacy Policy

How K-LINE MEN handles the personal information you share with us when shopping online or in store.

Last updated: 7 May 2026

Who we are

K-LINE Design Ltd, trading as K-LINE MEN ("we", "us", "our"), is a menswear retailer based at Fraine Building, Ntinda, Kampala, Uganda. You can reach us on WhatsApp at +256 777 466 979 or by email at klinedesignltd@gmail.com.

What information we collect

We only collect the information we need to take and fulfil your order. That's:

  • Contact details you give us — name, WhatsApp number, phone number, or email — when you message us, submit the contact form, or place an order.
  • Order details — the products you ask about or order, the size and colour, and the delivery location you share with us.
  • Payment confirmation — Mobile Money or bank-transfer references shared on WhatsApp. We do not store card numbers; card payments are made offline through trusted local partners.
  • Browsing data on this site — your bag and wishlist are saved in your browser's local storage, on your device. We don't have a server-side account system, so we don't see what's in your bag until you message it to us.
  • Hosting logs — like every website, our hosting provider keeps short-lived access logs (IP address, page requested, timestamp) for security and reliability.

How we use your information

  • To take and confirm orders, including sizing, availability, and delivery.
  • To answer questions about products, sizing, styling, or delivery.
  • To resolve issues with delivery, payments, exchanges, or returns.
  • To improve the catalog and the site.

We don't use your data for unsolicited marketing. If we ever start a newsletter or weekly outfit drop, it will be opt-in only.

Lawful basis

We process your information on the basis of your consent (when you message us, submit the contact form, or place an order) and our legitimate interest in running the business and delivering the items you have asked for — consistent with the Uganda Data Protection and Privacy Act, 2019.

Who we share your information with

We share your information only with the parties needed to deliver our service:

  • WhatsApp / Meta Platforms — when you message us on WhatsApp, that conversation is processed by Meta on its terms. Your phone number and message content sit on Meta's servers under their privacy policy.
  • Formspree — our contact-form provider receives the name, contact channel, and message you submit and forwards them to our email inbox. Formspree is based in the United States.
  • Delivery partners — couriers we engage to deliver your order receive your name, delivery address, and phone number for that delivery.
  • Hosting provider — the company that hosts this site has access to standard server logs for security and reliability.

We do not sell or rent your information to third parties.

International transfers

Some of our service providers (notably Meta and Formspree) are based outside Uganda. By messaging us on WhatsApp or submitting the contact form, you consent to your data being transferred to and processed in those jurisdictions, which may have different data-protection rules from Uganda. Where reasonable we choose providers that publish standard data-protection commitments.

How long we keep it

We keep order-related WhatsApp conversations and email correspondence for as long as is needed to handle the order, returns, exchanges, and any follow-up — typically up to 24 months. After that we delete or anonymise records, unless we are required to keep them for tax or legal reasons.

Your rights

Under the Uganda Data Protection and Privacy Act, 2019, you have the right to:

  • Access the personal information we hold about you.
  • Correct it if it is inaccurate or incomplete.
  • Ask us to delete it where it is no longer needed for the purpose we collected it.
  • Object to processing or withdraw consent.
  • Lodge a complaint with the Personal Data Protection Office of Uganda.

To exercise any of these rights, message us on WhatsApp at +256 777 466 979 or email klinedesignltd@gmail.com. We aim to respond within 30 days.

Security

We use HTTPS across the site, keep our hosting environment up to date, and limit access to customer data to the people who need it. No system is perfectly secure — if you suspect that something has gone wrong with your data, please contact us right away.

Cookies and local storage

We don't use tracking cookies. The site uses your browser's local storage to remember your bag and wishlist on this device — that data never leaves your browser unless you click "Checkout on WhatsApp", which sends a copy of your bag to us via WhatsApp.

Changes to this policy

We may update this policy when our practices change or to keep up with the law. The "Last updated" date at the top will reflect the most recent change. Significant updates will be flagged on the site.

Contact

Questions about this policy? Message us on WhatsApp at +256 777 466 979, email klinedesignltd@gmail.com, or visit us at Fraine Building, Ntinda, Kampala — Mon–Sat, 9am–7pm.
